initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(p.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob >= '1980-01-01'
  AND d.dob <= '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    AVG(p.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob >= '1980-01-01'
    AND d.dob <= '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;
